question_title: Will the English Wikipedia have at least 7,145,000 articles before March 1, 2026?
summary: English Wikipedia currently has 7,140,397 articles and needs to reach 7,145,000 by March 1, 2026 — a gap of 4,603 articles in ~8 days, requiring ~575 articles/day. The recent growth rate (Nov 2025-Feb 2026) is only ~390/day, well below what's needed. Even the 2025 full-year average of 534/day and Wikipedia's stated rate of ~500/day both project falling short. A Monte Carlo simulation with blended rate scenarios gives ~6% probability. The recent downward trend in growth rate is a significant headwind.

factors.description: Recent growth rate (~390/day for Nov 2025-Feb 2026) is well below the 575/day needed to close the 4,603-article gap in 8 days
Even the 2025 full-year average (534/day) falls short of the needed 575/day, projecting a shortfall of ~331 articles
Wikipedia's own stated rate of ~500/day (as of Feb 2026) also falls short, projecting ~603 articles short
Possible upside: 4 of 10 months in 2025 exceeded 575/day; bot runs or AfC backlog clearances could produce a multi-day spike
The recent trend is downward (390/day vs 534 avg), suggesting structural or seasonal slowdown rather than random dip

reasoning:
**Forecast: 6% probability (NO is strongly favored)**

Key findings:
- **Current count**: 7,140,397 articles (as of Feb 21, 2026)
- **Target**: 7,145,000 — a gap of **4,603 articles** in ~8 days
- **Required rate**: ~575 articles/day
- **Recent actual rate**: ~390/day (Nov 2025 - Feb 2026) — dramatically below needed
- **2025 annual average**: ~534/day — still below the 575/day threshold
- **Wikipedia's stated rate**: ~500/day — also projects falling ~600 articles short

Even under the most favorable realistic scenario (reversion to 2025 average of 534/day), the projected count on March 1 would be ~7,144,669 — still 331 articles short. Only an unusually sustained burst of article creation (e.g., a major bot run) could close the gap, and the recent downward trend in growth rate makes this even less likely.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the English Wikipedia have at least 7,145,000 articles before March 1, 2026?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42235)
resolution_criteria: This question resolves to yes if the “Content pages” count shown on the English Wikipedia Special:Statistics page is at least 7,145,000 at any time before March 1, 2026. The primary source is English Wikipedia’s statistics page at [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Statistics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Statistics)
background_info:
English Wikipedia article count is a simple proxy for the project’s growth rate and content creation dynamics, which can be relevant for platform and knowledge-ecosystem monitoring.
